# gloood

> Website design and performance marketing for ambitious SMBs. We build sites that convert and run the paid media to fill them — one small senior team, end to end.

## Site

- [Home](https://gloood.in/): overview of gloood, services, featured work
- [About](https://gloood.in/about): how we think, our approach to outcomes over outputs
- [Work](https://gloood.in/work): full list of case studies
- [Insights](https://gloood.in/insights): practical guides on websites, performance marketing, and growth for Indian SMBs
- [Contact](https://gloood.in/contact): get in touch to discuss a project

## Services

- [Launch — Website Design](https://gloood.in/services/website-design): new websites, 5–7 pages, design + build + copy, 2–3 week turnaround on Next.js
- [Grow — Performance Ads](https://gloood.in/services/performance-ads): Meta and Google Ads management for Indian SMBs, creative + targeting + tracking
- [Launch + Grow (Bundle)](https://gloood.in/services/launch-grow): website plus 90 days of paid ads, delivered as one engagement
- [Revamp](https://gloood.in/services/revamp): redesign and CRO for underperforming sites, keeps SEO intact

## Industries

- [Restaurants](https://gloood.in/industries/restaurants): restaurant websites and Swiggy/Zomato-aware performance ads
- [B2B & Industrial](https://gloood.in/industries/b2b-industrial): use-case-led B2B sites with spec sheets, RFQ flows, and Google Search campaigns
- [Healthcare](https://gloood.in/industries/healthcare): booking-first clinic sites with compliant review-led creative

## Locations

- [Mumbai](https://gloood.in/locations/mumbai): Mumbai-based agency serving Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Thane
- [India](https://gloood.in/locations/india): pan-India performance marketing and website delivery

## Insights

- [How much does a website cost in India in 2026?](https://gloood.in/insights/cost-of-website-design-india-2026): real price ranges for SMB website design — freelancers, DIY, agencies, enterprise
- [Meta Ads vs Google Ads for Indian SMBs](https://gloood.in/insights/sme-guide-meta-vs-google-ads-india): when each channel wins, India-2026 CPC/CPL benchmarks, how to split budget
- [The website redesign checklist that actually lifts conversions](https://gloood.in/insights/website-redesign-checklist-that-converts): 14-point redesign checklist covering audit, SEO preservation, CRO, and launch QA

## Case studies

- [iORA Dental](https://gloood.in/work/iora-dental): new website plus lead pipeline — 2.8× monthly bookings, 71% CPA reduction
- [King of Kurry](https://gloood.in/work/king-of-kurry): restaurant website and delivery-focused ads
- [Prime Video](https://gloood.in/work/prime-video): landing page and performance campaign
- [Skycom](https://gloood.in/work/skycom): B2B website revamp
- [TrustTec](https://gloood.in/work/trusttec): lead generation site and ad stack
